generated_for: AI agent / LLM tool-use consumption (RAG + function-calling friendly)
description: Agent-friendly JSON representation of the Phase 1 Shipment + Customer data model. Mirrors db/init/01_phase1_schema.sql and db/init/02_dashboard_summary_views.sql exactly (verified against the live DDL). Five tables (customers, shipments, tracking_events, shipment_issues, shipment_chat_log), one grounded-context view (v_shipment_journey_summary), and ten dashboard summary views. Each entity includes its table mapping, field definitions with datatypes/descriptions/sample values, relationships for graph traversal, and a fully linked sample record so an agent can reason about a real shipment lifecycle and write correct SQL without needing to inspect the DB first.

agent_context.purpose: Support the Phase 1 AI 'Shipment Journey Summary' chat feature: answer natural-language questions about a shipment's status and delay reason using a single grounded-context query, and generate dashboard KPI narration from the summary views.

recommended_agents.role: Answer natural-language customer/support questions about a shipment ('where is it', 'why is it late') by calling v_shipment_journey_summary once per tracking_id and grounding the answer entirely in that payload.
Generate natural-language executive summaries and 'critical areas needing attention' highlights from the dashboard summary views (headline KPIs, open issues, delay-reason breakdown).

agent_context.governance: Every chat interaction MUST be written to shipment_chat_log (user_query, ai_response, context_snapshot, confidence_score). confidence_score below 0.75 should be flagged for human support review — there is no separate governance/action-log table in Phase 1; shipment_chat_log is the sole audit trail.

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_shipment_journey_summary WHERE tracking_id = $1;
query_patterns.example_nl: Where is tracking number 794658312457 right now?

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_shipment_journey_summary WHERE tracking_id = $1;  -- includes reason_for_delay, delay_comments, open_issue_count
query_patterns.example_nl: Why is my shipment delayed?

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT customs_status, is_international FROM shipments WHERE tracking_id = $1;
query_patterns.example_nl: Is my international package stuck in customs?

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM shipment_issues WHERE tracking_id = $1 AND status IN ('OPEN','INVESTIGATING') ORDER BY reported_at DESC;
query_patterns.example_nl: Are there any open issues on this shipment?

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_dashboard_headline; SELECT * FROM v_open_issues_summary WHERE status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY issue_count DESC;
query_patterns.example_nl: Give me today's critical shipment issues.

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_top_customers;
query_patterns.example_nl: Who are our top shippers and how's their on-time rate?

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_dashboard_headline;
query_patterns.example_nl: Give me the overall dashboard summary.

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_status_breakdown ORDER BY shipment_count DESC;
query_patterns.example_nl: Give me a breakdown of shipments by current status.

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_ontime_performance;
query_patterns.example_nl: What's our overall on-time delivery performance?

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_delay_reason_breakdown ORDER BY shipment_count DESC;
query_patterns.example_nl: What are the most common reasons shipments are delayed?

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_domestic_vs_international;
query_patterns.example_nl: How many domestic versus international shipments do we have?

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_daily_volume_trend ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 14;
query_patterns.example_nl: Show me shipment volume trend over the last two weeks.

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_service_level_mix ORDER BY shipment_count DESC;
query_patterns.example_nl: How is each delivery service level performing?

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM v_chat_activity_summary;
query_patterns.example_nl: How is the AI chat feature being used?

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT s.* FROM shipments s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = s.customer_id WHERE c.org_name = $1;
query_patterns.example_nl: Show me all shipments for Acme Corp.

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT s.* FROM shipments s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = s.customer_id WHERE c.org_name = $1 AND s.reason_for_delay <> 'NONE';
query_patterns.example_nl: Which of Acme Corp's shipments are currently delayed?

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM shipments WHERE current_status = $1 ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 20;
query_patterns.example_nl: Show me shipments that are lost.

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM shipments WHERE package_type = $1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
query_patterns.example_nl: Show me all pallet-sized package shipments.

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM shipments WHERE delivery_type = $1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
query_patterns.example_nl: Show me all express delivery shipments.

query_patterns.recommended_query: SELECT * FROM shipments WHERE failed_delivery_attempts > 0 ORDER BY failed_delivery_attempts DESC LIMIT 20;
query_patterns.example_nl: Which shipments have had failed delivery attempts?

lifecycle_state_machine.notes: CUSTOMS_HOLD / CUSTOMS_CLEARED apply only when shipments.is_international = true, as a sub-stage of the connecting hub. Every transition (and the initial insert) is auto-logged to tracking_events via the trg_shipments_stage_history DB trigger, so tracking_events is always a complete timeline — no manual event-writing needed by agents.

customer.description: The organization/account holder. One customer can have many shipments.

customer_profile.description: Flexible profile blob: contact_name, email, phone, tier, etc.

updated_at.description: Auto-updated by trg_customers_updated_at on every UPDATE

shipment.description: CORE ENTITY. Tracking-ID-centric shipment record. Package, customs, pickup, and delivery-appointment detail are folded directly into this table (no separate packages/customs_declarations/pickup_requests/delivery_appointments tables in Phase 1) to minimize joins for the chat agent's context query. Use this raw table (not a view) for ad-hoc grouping, filtering, counting, or breakdown questions by package_type, package_size, package_weight_kg, delivery_type, pickup_date, delivery_window, or failed_delivery_attempts — none of the dashboard views pre-aggregate by these package/logistics attributes, only by status, delay reason, or customer.

tracking_id.description: Primary key — public tracking number. NOT a UUID; this is the stable externally-visible identifier.

order_id.description: External order-system reference; order management is out of Phase 1 scope

customs_status.description: Customs clearance state, folded in from the deferred customs_declarations concept

current_status.description: Authoritative journey stage — see lifecycle_state_machine. Auto-logs to tracking_events via trigger on every change.

delivery_date.description: Actual delivery timestamp, null until DELIVERED

delay_comments.sample_value: Missing HS code; awaiting broker resubmission.

last_delivery_attempt_at.description: Timestamp of most recent delivery attempt

updated_at.description: Auto-updated by trg_shipments_updated_at on every UPDATE

tracking_event.description: Append-only journey log — one row per stage transition. Auto-logged by the trg_shipments_stage_history DB trigger whenever shipments.current_status changes (and on insert); this is the primary context source for the AI chat's journey_timeline.

tracking_id.description: FK to shipments, ON DELETE CASCADE

stage.description: Journey stage recorded at this event — same enum as shipments.current_status

notes.description: Nullable; auto-trigger writes 'Auto-logged on status change'

shipment_issue.description: One row per delay/failed-delivery/RCA incident — the 'check existing issue details' requirement. Looked up by the AI chat agent and by ops before opening a duplicate. Lighter replacement for the deferred full shipment_exceptions RCA ledger.

tracking_id.description: FK to shipments, ON DELETE CASCADE

description.sample_value: Missing HS code on declaration; awaiting broker resubmission.

shipment_chat_log.description: Audit log of every AI chat interaction — question, grounded context used, generated answer, and confidence score — enabling QA review of the Phase 1 journey-summary chat feature. This is the ONLY agent-governance mechanism in Phase 1 (no separate agent_action_log).

tracking_id.description: FK to shipments, nullable for general queries, ON DELETE SET NULL

customer_id.description: FK to customers, nullable, ON DELETE SET NULL

ai_response.sample_value: Your package is currently held at customs in Frankfurt due to a missing HS code on the declaration...

context_snapshot.description: Full grounded context used, i.e. the v_shipment_journey_summary row at answer time

confidence_score.description: 0-1; below 0.75 should be flagged for human review

v_shipment_journey_summary.purpose: Single grounded-context payload for the AI Shipment Journey Summary chat. Call once per tracking_id instead of joining tables manually.
columns: journey_timeline (JSONB array of {stage, location, event_timestamp, notes}, ordered by event_timestamp)

v_dashboard_headline.purpose: One-row headline snapshot for the top of the dashboard — 10 KPIs, one query. Backs GET /api/summary.

v_status_breakdown.purpose: Counts + share of total by current_status. Backs GET /api/status-breakdown.

v_ontime_performance.purpose: On-time delivery performance for shipments that have a verdict (delivered or overdue-in-transit).

v_delay_reason_breakdown.purpose: Breakdown of delayed shipments by reason_for_delay (excludes NONE).

v_open_issues_summary.purpose: The dashboard 'critical areas needing attention' widget.

v_domestic_vs_international.purpose: Domestic vs international split plus a customs-status snapshot.

v_daily_volume_trend.purpose: Created vs delivered shipment volume per calendar day across the full date range in the data.

v_service_level_mix.purpose: Shipment volume and on-time % by delivery_type (service level).

v_top_customers.purpose: Top 25 customers by shipment volume, with their own on-time rate.

v_chat_activity_summary.purpose: AI chat feature usage snapshot — volume, average confidence, and low-confidence count needing review.

sample_linked_dataset.narrative: Acme Corp ships wireless headphones internationally from San Francisco to Berlin. The shipment is held at customs in Frankfurt due to a missing HS code, generating an open shipment_issue. A customer support agent asks the AI chat why the package is delayed; the chat agent answers using v_shipment_journey_summary and logs the interaction.

shipment.delay_comments: Missing HS code; awaiting broker resubmission.

shipment_issue.description: Missing HS code on declaration; awaiting broker resubmission.

shipment_chat_log.ai_response: Your package is currently held at customs in Frankfurt due to a missing HS code on the declaration. The broker has been notified and it should clear within 24 hours. Estimated delivery is now July 19, 6:00 PM local time, pending clearance.
